debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
hf : IsIso f
⊢ @CategoryInContext.Category.Mono α C X Y f ∧ @CategoryInContext.Category.Epi α C X Y f

failed_attempts:
simpa using h₂
    have h₄ : h = k := by
      -- Use the inverse to show that h and k must be equal
      have h₅ : IsIso f := hf
      have h₆ : ∃ (g : Hom Y X), (g ≫ f = id X) ∧ f ≫ g = id Y := by
        -- Extract the inverse of f from the isIso hypothesis
        cases' hf with g hg
        refine' ⟨g, _⟩
        exact ⟨hg.1, hg.2⟩
      obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := h₆
      have h₇ : h ≫ f ≫ g = k ≫ f ≫ g := by rw [h₃]
      calc
        h = h ≫ f ≫ g := by
          calc
            h = h ≫ id X := by simp
            _ = h ≫ (g ≫ f) := by rw [hg.1]
            _ = (h ≫ f) ≫ g := by rw [assoc]
            _ = (h ≫ f ≫ g) := by simp [assoc]
        _ = k ≫ f ≫ g := by rw [h₇]
        _ = k := by
          calc
            k ≫ f ≫ g = (k ≫ f) ≫ g := by simp [assoc]
            _ = (k ≫ f ≫ g) := by simp [assoc]
            _ = k ≫ (f ≫ g) := by rw [← assoc]
            _ = k ≫ id Y := by rw [hg.2]
            _ = k := by simp
    exact h₄
  have h2 : ∀ {Z} (h k : Hom Y Z), f ≫ h = f ≫ k → h = k := by
    intro Z h k h_eq_k
    have h₃ : f ≫ h = f ≫ k := h_eq_k
    have h₄ : f ≫ h = f ≫ k := by simpa using h₃
    have h₅ : h = k := by
      -- Use the inverse to show that h and k must be equal
      have h₆ : IsIso f := hf
      have h₇ : ∃ (g : Hom Y X), (g ≫ f = id X) ∧ f ≫ g = id Y := by
        -- Extract the inverse of f from the isIso hypothesis
        cases' hf with g hg
        refine' ⟨g, _⟩
        exact ⟨hg.1, hg.2⟩
      obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := h₇
      have h₈ : (f ≫ h) ≫ g = (f ≫ k) ≫ g := by rw [h₄]
      calc
        h = (h ≫ id Y) := by simp
        _ = (h ≫ (f ≫ g)) := by rw [hg.2]
        _ = (h ≫ f) ≫ g := by rw [← assoc]
        _ = (f ≫ h) ≫ g := by rw [← assoc]
        _ = (f ≫ k) ≫ g := by rw [h₈]
        _ = (f ≫ k) ≫ g := by rfl
        _ = (k ≫ f) ≫ g := by rw [← assoc]
        _ = k ≫ (f ≫ g) := by rw [← assoc]
        _ = k ≫ id Y := by rw [hg.2]
        _ = k := by simp
    exact h₅
  exact ⟨h1, h2⟩

shows that f is monic
    exact h₂
  have h₂ : Epi f := by
    -- Prove that f is epic
    have h₃ : ∀ {Z} (h k : Hom Y Z), f ≫ h = f ≫ k → h = k := by
      intro Z h k h_eq
      -- Use the fact that f is an isomorphism to cancel it on the left
      have h₄ : IsIso f := hf
      have h₅ : Hom.IsCancelLeft f := by
        -- Since f is an isomorphism, it is cancelable on the left
        exact IsIso.isCancelLeft h₄
      -- Cancel f from f ≫ h = f ≫ k to get h = k
      exact h₅ h_eq
    -- The above shows that f is epic
    exact h₃
  -- Combine the two results
  exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩

rw [assoc]
          _ = (k ≫ g) ≫ f := by
            have h₉ : h ≫ g = k ≫ g := by
              calc
                h ≫ g = (h ≫ g) ≫ (id Y) := by simp
                _ = (h ≫ g) ≫ (f ≫ g) := by
                  have h₁₀ : f ≫ g = id Y := by
                    have h₁₁ : g ≫ f = id X := h₆
                    have h₁₂ : IsIso f := h₂
                    have h₁₃ : f ≫ g = id Y := by
                      calc
                        f ≫ g = f ≫ g := rfl
                        _ = id Y := by
                          have h₁₄ : IsIso f := h₂
                          have h₁₅ : f ≫ g = id Y := by
                            exact h₁₄.symm_inv g
                          exact h₁₅
                    exact h₁₃
                  rw [h₁₀]
                  <;> simp
                _ = (h ≫ f) ≫ g := by rw [assoc]
                _ = (k ≫ f) ≫ g := by rw [h₇]
                _ = k ≫ g := by rw [assoc]
            rw [h₉]
          _ = k ≫ (g ≫ f) := by rw [assoc]
          _ = k ≫ id X := by rw [h₆]
          _ = k := by simp
      exact h₈
    exact h₃
  have h₂ : @CategoryInContext.Category.Epi α C X Y f := by
    have h₃ : IsIso f := hf
    have h₄ : ∀ {Z} (h k : Hom Y Z), f ≫ h = f ≫ k → h = k := by
      intro Z h k h₅
      have h₆ : ∃ (g : Hom Y X), g ≫ f = id X := by
        exact h₃.repr
      obtain ⟨g, h₇⟩ := h₆
      have h₈ : f ≫ h = f ≫ k := h₅
      have h₉ : h = k := by
        calc
          h = id Y ≫ h := by simp
          _ = (g ≫ f) ≫ h := by
            have h₁₀ : g ≫ f = id X := h₇
            have h₁₁ : IsIso f := h₃
            have h₁₂ : (g ≫ f) = id X := h₁₀
            have h₁₃ : (id X : Hom X X) = id X := rfl
            have h₁₄ : (g ≫ f) ≫ h = (id X : Hom X X) ≫ h := by rw [h₁₂]
            have h₁₅ : (id X : Hom X X) ≫ h = h := by simp
            simp_all [h₁₂]
            <;>
            (try simp_all [h₁₂])
            <;>
            (try simp_all [h₁₂])
          _ = g ≫ (f ≫ h) := by rw [assoc]
          _ = g ≫ (f ≫ k) := by rw [h₈]
          _ = (g ≫ f) ≫ k := by rw [assoc]
          _ = id X ≫ k := by
            have h₁₀ : g ≫ f = id X := h₇
            rw [h₁₀]
          _ = k := by simp
      exact h₉
    exact h₄
  exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩

simp [hg.1, hg.2])
        _ = h₃ ≫ g.inv
        _ = h₂ ≫ g.inv (by simp [hg.1, hg.2])
        _ = h₂ := by simp [hg.1, hg.2]
    exact h₄
  · -- Prove that f is an epimorphism
    rcases hf with ⟨g, hg⟩
    intro Z h₁ h₂ h₃
    have h₄ : h₁ = h₂ := by
      calc
        h₁ = g.inv ≫ h₁ (by simp [hg.1, hg.2])
        _ = g.inv ≫ h₃
        _ = g.inv ≫ h₂ (by simp [hg.1, hg.2])
        _ = h₂ := by simp [hg.1, hg.2]
    exact h₄

simp_all [IsIso]
    have h₃ : f ≫ g = id Y := by
      simp_all [IsIso]
    intro W h k h₄
    have h₅ : h = k := by
      calc
        h = h ≫ (f ≫ g) := by
          rw [h₃]
          simp [id_comp]
        _ = (h ≫ f) ≫ g := by
          rw [← comp_assoc]
        _ = (k ≫ f) ≫ g := by rw [h₄]
        _ = k ≫ (f ≫ g) := by
          rw [comp_assoc]
        _ = k ≫ (id Y) := by rw [h₃]
        _ = k := by simp [comp_id]
    exact h₅
  have h₂ : Epi f := by
    obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := hf
    have h₃ : g ≫ f = id X := by
      simp_all [IsIso]
    have h₄ : f ≫ g = id Y := by
      simp_all [IsIso]
    intro Z h k h₅
    have h₆ : h = k := by
      calc
        h = (g ≫ f) ≫ h := by
          simp [h₃, id_comp]
        _ = g ≫ (f ≫ h) := by
          rw [← comp_assoc]
        _ = g ≫ (f ≫ k) := by rw [h₅]
        _ = (g ≫ f) ≫ k := by
          rw [comp_assoc]
        _ = (id X) ≫ k := by simp [h₃]
        _ = k := by simp [comp_id]
    exact h₆
  exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩

show that f is a monomorphism
        have h₃ :Mono f :=Mono.of_left_inverse (by
          -- Obtain the inverse of f
          obtain ⟨g, hg₁, hg₂⟩ := h₂
          -- Use the inverse to show that f is a left inverse
          refine' ⟨g, _⟩
          -- Use the properties of the inverse to show that f is a monomorphism
          simp_all [hg₁, hg₂]
          <;>
          (try simp_all [Category.isLeftInverse_iff, Category.isRightInverse_iff])
          <;>
          (try
            {
              ext x
              simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
              <;>
              (try simp_all [ Categoria.isLeftInverse_iff, Categoria.isRightInverse_iff])
            })
          <;>
          (try simp_all [Categoria.isLeftInverse_iff, Categoria.isRightInverse_iff])
          <;>
          (try
            {
              ext x
              simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
              <;>
              (try simp_all [Categoria.isLeftInverse_iff, Categoria.isRightInverse_iff])
            })
        )
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Category.isLeftInverse_iff, Category.isRightInverse_iff])
        <;>
        (try
          {
            ext x
            simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
            <;>
            (try simp_all [Categoria.isLeftInverse_iff, Categoria.isRightInverse_iff])
          })
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Categoria.isLeftInverse_iff, Categoria.isRightInverse_iff])

            ext x
            simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
            <;>
            (try simp_all [Categoria.isLeftInverse_iff, Categoria.isRightInverse_iff])

      <;>

      (try

          ext x

          <;>
          (try simp_all [Categoria.isLeftInverse_iff, Categoria.isRightInverse_iff])

      <;>

      <;>
      (try
        {
          ext x
          simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
          <;>
          (try simp_all [Categoria.isLeftInverse_iff, Categoria.isRightInverse_iff])
        })
    exact h₁
  · -- Prove that f is an epimorphism
    have h₂ : Epi f := by
      -- Use the fact that an isomorphism is an epimorphism
      have h₃ : IsIso f := hf
      exact by
        -- Use the property of isomorphisms to show that f is an epimorphism
        have h₄ : Epi f := Epi.of_right_inverse (by
          -- Obtain the inverse of f
          obtain ⟨g, hg₁, hg₂⟩ := h₃
          -- Use the inverse to show that f is a right inverse
          refine' ⟨g, _⟩
          -- Use the properties of the inverse to show that f is an epimorphism
          simp_all [hg₁, hg₂]
          <;>
          (try simp_all [Category.isLeftInverse_iff, Category.isRightInverse_iff])
          <;>
          (try
            {
              ext x
              simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
              <;>
              (try simp_all [Categoria.isLeftInverse_iff, Categoria.isRightInverse_iff])
            })
          <;>
          (try simp_all [Categoria.isLeftInverse_iff, Categoria.isRightInverse_iff])
          <;>
          (try
            {
              ext x
              simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
              <;>
              (try simp_all [Categoria.isLeftInverse_iff, Categoria.isRightInverse_iff])
            })
        )
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Category.isLeftInverse_iff, Category.isRightInverse_iff])
        <;>
        (try
          {
            ext x
            simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
            <;>
            (try simp_all [Categoria.isLeftInverse_iff, Categoria.isRightInverse_iff])
          })
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Categoria.isLeftInverse_iff, Categoria.isRightInverse_iff])
        <;>
        (try
          {
            ext x
            simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
            <;>
            (try simp_all [ Categoria.isLeftInverse_iff,_CATEGORY.isRightInverse_iff])
          })
    exact h₂

simp [id_comp]
        _ = k ≫ id X := by rw [h₆]
        _ = k := by simp [id_comp]
    exact h₇
  
  have h₂ : Epi f := by
    rcases hf with ⟨g, hg⟩
    refine' fun Z h k h_eq => _
    have h₃ : f ≫ h = f ≫ k := h_eq
    have h₄ : (g ≫ f) ≫ h = (g ≫ f) ≫ k := by
      calc
        (g ≫ f) ≫ h = g ≫ (f ≫ h) := by rw [assoc]
        _ = g ≫ (f ≫ k) := by rw [h₃]
        _ = (g ≫ f) ≫ k := by rw [← assoc]
    have h₅ : g ≫ f = id X := by
      calc
        g ≫ f = id X := by
          have h₅₁ : IsIso f := ⟨g, hg⟩
          have h₅₂ : g ≫ f = id X := by
            simp_all [IsIso]
            <;> aesop
          exact h₅₂
        _ = id X := by rfl
    have h₆ : (id X) ≫ h = (id X) ≫ k := by
      calc
        (id X) ≫ h = (g ≫ f) ≫ h := by rw [h₅]
        _ = (g ≫ f) ≫ k := by rw [h₄]
        _ = (id X) ≫ k := by rw [h₅]
    have h₇ : h = k := by
      calc
        h = id X ≫ h := by simp [comp_id]
        _ = id X ≫ k := by rw [h₆]
        _ = k := by simp [comp_id]
    exact h₇
  
  exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩

simpa [comp_assoc] using h₇
      have h₉ : h ≫ (id Y) = k ≫ (id Y) := by
        simpa [hf'_comp] using h₈
      have h₁₀ : h = k := by
        simpa using h₉
      exact h₁₀
    exact h₂
  have h_epi : Epi f := by
    have h₁ : IsIso f := hf
    have h₂ : ∀ {Z} (h k : Hom Y Z), f ≫ h = f ≫ k → h = k := by
      intro Z h k h_eq
      have h₃ : f ≫ h = f ≫ k := h_eq
      have h₄ : IsIso f := hf
      have h₅ : ∃ (f' : Hom Y X), f' ≫ f = id X ∧ f ≫ f' = id Y := by
        exact h₄
      obtain ⟨f', hf'_inv, hf'_comp⟩ := h₅
      have h₆ : f ≫ h = f ≫ k := h₃
      have h₇ : f' ≫ (f ≫ h) = f' ≫ (f ≫ k) := by rw [h₆]
      have h₈ : (f' ≫ f) ≫ h = (f' ≫ f) ≫ k := by
        simpa [comp_assoc] using h₇
      have h₉ : (id X) ≫ h = (id X) ≫ k := by
        simpa [hf'_inv] using h₈
      have h₁₀ : h = k := by
        simpa using h₉
      exact h₁₀
    exact h₂
  exact ⟨h_mono, h_epi⟩

have h₁ : Mono f := by
    -- Prove that f is a monomorphism if it is an isomorphism
    have h₂ : IsMonic f := hf.1.isMonic
    exact h₂
  have h₂ : Epi f := by
    -- Prove that f is an epimorphism if it is an isomorphism
    have h₃ : IsEpic f := hf.1.isEpic
    exact h₃
  exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩

simp
        _ = h₁ ≫ (f ≫ g) := by
          simp [hg]
          <;> simp_all [Hom.ext_iff]
          <;> aesop
        _ = (h₁ ≫ f) ≫ g := by
          simp [comp_assoc]
        _ = (h₂ ≫ f) ≫ g := by rw [h₃]
        _ = h₂ ≫ (f ≫ g) := by simp [comp_assoc]
        _ = h₂ ≫ (1 : Hom Y Y) := by
          simp [hg]
          <;> simp_all [Hom.ext_iff]
          <;> aesop
        _ = h₂ := by simp
    exact h₄
  · -- Prove that `f` is an epimorphism
    rcases hf with ⟨g, hg⟩
    intro Z h₁ h₂ h₃
    have h₄ : h₁ = h₂ := by
      calc
        h₁ = (1 : Hom X X) ≫ h₁ := by simp
        _ = (g ≫ f) ≫ h₁ := by
          simp [hg]
          <;> simp_all [Hom.ext_iff]
          <;> aesop
        _ = g ≫ (f ≫ h₁) := by simp [comp_assoc]
        _ = g ≫ (f ≫ h₂) := by rw [h₃]
        _ = (g ≫ f) ≫ h₂ := by simp [comp_assoc]
        _ = (1 : Hom X X) ≫ h₂ := by
          simp [hg]
          <;> simp_all [Hom.ext_iff]
          <;> aesop
        _ = h₂ := by simp
    exact h₄
